steps.expected: Dashboard loads with Kanban board showing task cards
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully with all status columns and task cards visible

steps.action: Click on 'In progress task' card in In Progress column
steps.expected: Detail view opens showing task details
steps.observed: Dialog opened with heading 'In progress task' and full detail content

steps.expected: Shows title, description, timestamps, agent info, activity history
steps.observed: Detail view shows: Title ('In progress task'), Status ('In Progress'), Type ('implementation'), Description ('Task being worked on'), Project ('Alpha Project'), Assigned Agent ('bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb'), Created timestamp, Updated timestamp, Claimed timestamp, Task ID, Activity History with 3 entries, Edit and Delete buttons

evidence.observations: Task detail dialog displays all required information: title, status, task type, description, project, assigned agent, created/updated/claimed timestamps, task ID, activity history with timestamped entries, and Edit/Delete action buttons. The dialog has a Close button (×) and is properly modal.

steps.action: Click '+ New Task' button on dashboard
steps.observed: Dialog opened with heading 'Create New Task' and form fields

steps.expected: Form has project selector, title, description, task type fields
steps.observed: Form contains: PROJECT dropdown (required), TITLE textbox (required), DESCRIPTION textbox (optional), TASK TYPE dropdown (required) with options (Implementation, Bug Fix, Feature, Deployment, Documentation, Testing, Research, Other), 'Requires approval' checkbox, Cancel and Create Task buttons

steps.action: Fill form: Project='Alpha Project', Title='VAL-DASH-013 Test Task', Description='Test task created by validator', Task Type='Feature'

steps.expected: Task created, form closes, task appears in backlog column
steps.observed: Form closed, new task 'VAL-DASH-013 Test Task' appeared in Backlog column with 'Feature' type and 'Unclaimed' status

evidence.observations: The '+ New Task' button opens a form dialog with all required fields (project selector, title, description, task type). After filling and submitting, the task was created immediately and appeared in the Backlog column without requiring page refresh.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-DASH-008: Task detail view shows all required information (title, description, timestamps, agent info, activity history). VAL-DASH-013: New Task button opens form with project selector, title, description, task type fields; submitting creates task that appears immediately in backlog column.
